SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.repository.graph

Interface UserGraphRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<UserNode,String>, org.springframework.data.neo4j.repository.Neo4jRepository<@NonNull UserNode,@NonNull String>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<UserNode,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<UserNode>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<UserNode,String>
public interface UserGraphRepository extends org.springframework.data.neo4j.repository.Neo4jRepository<@NonNull UserNode,@NonNull String>
Neo4j Repository for managing UserNode entities.

Handles user nodes and their relationships (e.g., LIKES) in the social graph.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Suggests potential new friends for a user using a multi-criteria graph traversal.

  • Method Details

    • deleteFriendship

      @Query("MATCH (u:User {username: $username})-[r:`:FRIENDSHIP`]-(f:User {username: $friendUsername}) DELETE r") void deleteFriendship(String username, String friendUsername)
      Removes a friendship relationship between two users.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the first user.
      friendUsername - The username of the second user.

    • deleteAttendecy

      @Query("MATCH (u:User {id: $userId})-[r:`:ATTENDS`]-(e:Event {id: $eventId}) DELETE r") void deleteAttendecy(String userId, String eventId)
      Removes an attendance relationship between a user and an event.
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user.
      eventId - The unique identifier of the event.

    • suggestFriends

      @Query("MATCH (user:User {id: $userId})-[:`:FRIENDSHIP`]-(friend:User)\nMATCH (friend)-[:`:FRIENDSHIP`]-(newFriend:User)\nWHERE NOT (user)-[:`:FRIENDSHIP`]-(newFriend)\nWITH user, COLLECT (DISTINCT newFriend) AS newFriends\nMATCH (user)-[:`:LIKES`]->(topic:Topic)\nMATCH (topic)<-[:`:LIKES`]-(topicFriend:User)\nWHERE user.id <> topicFriend.id\nAND NOT (user)-[:`:FRIENDSHIP`]-(topicFriend)\nWITH newFriends, COLLECT (DISTINCT topicFriend) AS topicFriends\nWITH newFriends + topicFriends AS allFriends\nUNWIND allFriends as friend\nRETURN DISTINCT friend\nLIMIT $limit;") List<UserNode> suggestFriends(String userId, int limit)
      Suggests potential new friends for a user using a multi-criteria graph traversal.

      The algorithm identifies candidates through two paths:

      1. Friends of Friends: Users who are connected to the target user's direct friends but are not yet connected to the target user.
      2. Shared Interests: Users who like the same Topic nodes as the target user.

      The final result combines both groups, removes duplicates, and filters out the target user and their existing friends.

      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user receiving suggestions.
      limit - The maximum number of suggested users to return.
      Returns:
      A list of UserNode representing potential connections.
